stemHtml: Which one of the following is a requirement for checklists?

options.a: Pages of paper checklists should be divided by protruding thumb-locators.
options.b: All the letters should be upper case so that words can be read faster.
options.c: They must contain good cross-referencing and one colour should be used for consistency.
options.d: They must be responded to automatically in order to show skill and familiarity.
